title: thymus serpyllum f. ovatus
intro: Thymus serpyllum f. ovatus, also known as creeping thyme or wild thyme, is a subspecies of the Thymus serpyllum plant, a low-growing, spreading evergreen herb native to Europe and Asia. Thymus serpyllum f. ovatus possesses antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine for treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Thymus serpyllum f. ovatus have been used to reduce stress, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system, offering relief from symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats. Herbal preparations of Thymus serpyllum f. ovatus include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
